title: [YTP Remix] MorshuMon - Morshu MMM's The Pokemon Theme
description:
Here's a lame MMMorshu song I've been experimenting with lately.

Actually put some effort into it, other than my crappy poops.

Don't rip it pieces, it's my first time (SEXUAL REFERENCE WTFBBQ)

Pokemon is owned by Nintendo. The song is the Pokemon Gold/Silver opening.

Get ready for Heart Gold/Soul Silver, bitches.
